title: 2026 Golden Globes Winners List - IndieWire
text: IndieWire's comprehensive 2026 Golden Globes winners list details all major awards. Best Motion Picture Drama went to Hamnet. Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy went to One Battle After Another with Paul Thomas Anderson winning Best Director. In acting categories, Wagner Moura won Best Male Actor Drama for The Secret Agent while Jessie Buckley won Best Female Actor Drama for Hamnet. Timothée Chalamet won Best Male Actor Musical/Comedy for Marty Supreme and Rose Byrne won Best Female Actor Musical/Comedy for If I Had Legs I'd Kick You. The ceremony, hosted by Nikki Glaser at the Beverly Hilton on January 11, 2026, featured television awards including Noah Wyle for Best TV Drama Actor in The Pitt.
